{{Quote|Which means I'd better come up with something ''brilliant'' and ''fast!'' Because with Chewie putting the ''finishing touches'' on that big bruiser ''below''-- this is about to become a ''three-way contest''!|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 22">[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]]</ref>}}
'''Big bruiser''' was the nickname [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] gave to one of his opponents in [[The Big Game]]. The big bruiser was a hulking green humanoid. He was felled by a blow from [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 22}} {{1st}}
